title: Implicit algorithm — ALTER without ALGORITHM= risks silent COPY on large table
migration_snippet:
-- V5__add_column.sql
ALTER TABLE events ADD COLUMN source VARCHAR(100);
expected_feedback: Critical: ALTER TABLE without explicit ALGORITHM specification. On an 80M-row table, if the server silently chooses COPY, it will lock the table for hours. Specify ALGORITHM=INSTANT (supported for ADD COLUMN on 8.0.12+) and add session guards.
